notes: Lobby state machine UI, faster Hello→start, persona names in queue, cleaner matchmaking status. Matchmaking dual-queue fix retained. Both need 1.0.11.

history.notes: v1.0.10: Matchmaking reliability (staggered create, lobby list union, dual-lobby merge/requeue) + multiplayer wait-for-player / P2 join / Best of 5. Both players need this build.
Matchmaking fix: staggered create by Steam ID, multi-strategy lobby list union, aggressive dual-lobby merge + requeue so two searchers find each other.
Multiplayer fix: wait for players (1/2), reliable P2 join (GameStart retry + state bootstrap), Best of 5 (first to 3), round-end overlay clears between rounds.
Unlockable player hats: Dust currency, 13 cosmetics, loadout picker, online sync. Earn Dust by winning matches.
Multiplayer overhaul: host-only sim, networked combat FX, loadouts/skins/grenades online, hit-location crits, reliable input, strict DUSTLINE lobbies, disconnect + invite cold-start.
